tools.name: list_rooms
tools.title: List rooms
tools.description: List all active laboratory and computer rooms in the Department of Geology, including their code, name, type, floor, and equipment.

type.description: Filter by room type. Defaults to any.

tools.name: list_advisors
tools.title: List advisors
tools.description: List available faculty advisors (names only; contact emails are not exposed).

tools.name: get_reservation_status
tools.title: Get reservation status
tools.description: Look up a reservation's current approval status by its tracking token (the same token used on the public /status page).

tracking_token.description: The tracking token from the reservation confirmation.

tools.name: list_reservations
tools.title: List reservations (admin)
tools.description: List reservations visible to the signed-in user. Admins see all reservations; other users see none. Filter by status when useful.

status.description: Optional status filter (e.g. pending_advisor, pending_staff, pending_admin, confirmed, rejected).

limit.description: Max rows to return. Defaults to 25.
